label: Priority for Conservation
description: These pixels fall in the bottom 50th percentile of conservation priority in the blueprint. While these pixels are not considered to be prioritized, they can still have conservation value and conservation efforts in these areas are still encouraged.

label: Connections Between Priority Areas
description: Connections between prioritized areas (Highest, High, and Medium Conservation Priority) that cover the shortest distance possible, routing through the maximum pixel values possible.

label: Medium Conservation Priority
description: Medium Conservation Priority areas cover roughly 20% of the blueprint area, and consist of the 75th-55th percentile in priority rank.

label: High Conservation Priority
description: High Conservation Priority areas cover roughly 15% of the blueprint area, and consist of the 90th-75th percentile in priority rank.

label: Highest Conservation Priority
description: Highest Conservation Priority areas cover roughly 10% of the blueprint area, and consist of the top 10th percentile in priority rank.
